APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT VIA COURTCALL. THE COURT GRANTS PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 9/7/21 IS CONTINUED TO 1/18/22 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. ALL PRETRIAL DEADLINES, DISCOVERY AND MOTION PRACTICE INCLUDING 2034 CCP EXPERT DISCOVERY SHALL BE GOVERNED BY THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT AND MOVING PARTY SHALL SERVE THE ORDER.
